description: Quick-reference of party capabilities for creative problem solving. Updated after Level 4 milestone and Wave Echo Cave completion.
last_updated: session_4 — Level 4 + Wave Echo Cave + Forge of Spells upgrades

honu-tortle-fighter.summary: Tank/protector/tactical controller (Battle Master) — AC 21, Shell Defense AC 25, stealth +9
capabilities: Shell Defense (AC 25 — Natural 17 + Shield +2 bonus 4 + Shell +4, prone, speed 0, near-invulnerable)
Second Wind (1d10+4 self-heal, 1/short rest)
Action Surge (extra action, 1/short rest)
Fighting Style: Protection (reaction — impose disadvantage on attack vs adjacent ally)
Combat Superiority (4 superiority dice d8, DC 14, 1/short rest)
Trip Attack (hit + 1d8 extra + STR save DC 14 or prone — all melee attacks have advantage on prone target)
Goading Attack (hit + 1d8 extra + WIS save DC 14 or disadvantage vs everyone but Honu)
Riposte (reaction on miss — +8 to hit counterattack, 1d8+6+1d8 damage)
Longsword +2 (+8 to hit, 1d8+6 damage avg 10.5)
Shield +2 (AC 21 base)
Cloak of the Tide's Shadow (+5 stealth, advantage on stealth while stationary)
Gloves of Stealth (+3 stealth, no Natural Armor stealth penalty)
Stealth total: +9 (DEX +1, Gloves +3, Cloak +5) — advantage while stationary
STR grapple (+6)
Rope 50ft
Improved Critical (crit on 19 or 20)
Charge (bonus melee attack after 30ft move — can follow with Hooves bonus action)
Equine Build (carry/push double, counts as Large)
Hooves (1d4+6 bludgeoning bonus attack after Charge)
Second Wind (1d10+3 self-heal, 1/short rest)
Action Surge (extra action, 1/short rest)
Fighting Style: Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s/2s on damage)
Greatsword +3 (2d6+9, avg 16 damage — crit 4d6+9 avg 23)
Boots of Speed (double movement 60ft→120ft, 1/day 10 min)
Cloak of the Shadowed Knight (+2 AC, +2 saves, +5 stealth, advantage stealth while stationary)
Ring of Protection (+1 AC, +1 saves)
Gloves of Stealth (+3 stealth — removes heavy armor disadvantage)
AC 19 base (16 chain mail + 2 cloak + 1 ring)
Portent (2 pre-rolled d20s — replace ANY roll, declare before, 1/long rest)
War Caster (advantage on CON saves to maintain concentration, cast spells as opportunity attacks)
Forge of Spells attunement — nat 20 perfect attunement (ALL Forge costs halved for party)
Find Familiar — Archimedes the owl (scout, 120ft Darkvision, Flyby, Help action for advantage)
Web (20ft cube, DEX save or restrained, concentration — best opener vs groups)
Invisibility (make any party member invisible — use on Ala for guaranteed Assassinate)
Hold Person (paralyze humanoid, WIS save — combo with Portent for guarantee)
Faerie Fire (60ft cube, advantage for ENTIRE party on affected targets, breaks invisibility)
Absorb Elements (reaction — halve elemental/breath damage, add to next attack)
Misty Step (bonus action teleport 30ft — escape/reposition)
Chill Touch (1d8 necrotic — prevents healing on target, 120ft)
Toll the Dead (1d8/1d12 necrotic vs injured targets, free cantrip)
Fire Bolt (1d10 fire, 120ft, free cantrip)
Mage Hand (30ft spectral hand — manipulate objects, open doors, distract)
Minor Illusion (sound or image — distraction, ambush setup)
Staff of Defense (10 charges, 1d6+4/dawn — Mage Armor 1 charge AC21, Shield reaction 2 charges AC26)
Wand of the Burning Phoenix (7 charges — Fireball 4d8 fire 20ft radius DC15, 1d6+1/dawn)
Scroll of Counterspell x3 (reaction — counter enemy spell, auto-cancels 3rd level and lower)
Scroll of Augury (1 use — weal/woe before a decision)
Scroll of Blindness/Deafness (1 use — CON save or blinded)
Ring (silver, runes — Identified: Ring of Spell Storing, given to Ala)
Bracers of Defense (+2 AC, no attunement)
Arcane Recovery (recover spell slot on short rest, 1/day)
Darkvision 60ft
Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm, immune to magic sleep)

dain-mountain-dwarf-paladin.summary: Burst damage/off-healer/single-target hunter (Vengeance) — STR 21, AC 19, stealth +10
capabilities: Vow of Enmity (bonus action — advantage on ALL attacks vs 1 creature for 1 min, 1/short rest)
Abjure Enemy (action — WIS save DC 13 or frightened + speed 0, disadvantage for undead/fiends, 1/short rest)
Divine Sense (detect celestial/fiend/undead within 60ft, 4 uses/long rest)
Lay on Hands (20 HP healing pool, or 5 HP per cure disease/poison, 1/long rest)
Divine Smite (2d8 radiant on hit, +1d8 vs undead/fiends, costs spell slot)
Divine Health (immune to disease)
Bless (concentration — +1d4 attacks and saves for 3 creatures — default concentration spell)
Thunderous Smite (bonus action, concentration — next hit +2d6 thunder, STR save DC 13 or knocked prone + pushed 10ft)
Hunter's Mark (oath spell — bonus 1d6 per hit on marked target, concentration)
Command (one-word order, WIS save DC 13)
Cure Wounds (1d8+3 touch heal — CHA mod)
Shield of Faith (+2 AC to target, concentration)
Blade of the Drow Lord (+2 longsword, +9 to hit, 1d8+9 with Dueling, sheds dim light 15ft)
Battleaxe Hew (+1, max damage vs plants/wood, 1d8+8 with Dueling)
Fighting Style: Dueling (+2 damage one-handed melee)
Cloak of the Iron Veil (+5 stealth, advantage on stealth while stationary)
Gloves of Stealth (+3 stealth, removes heavy armor stealth disadvantage)
Stealth total: +10 (DEX +2, Gloves +3, Cloak +5) — advantage while stationary
Dwarven Resilience (advantage on poison saves, resistance to poison damage)
Darkvision 60ft
Stonecunning (double proficiency stonework History)
AC 19 (Chain Mail +1 = 17, Shield = 2)
Assassinate (advantage on creatures that haven't acted; AUTO-CRIT on surprised targets)
Sneak Attack (2d6 extra — needs advantage or adjacent ally, applies on bonus action too)
Cunning Action (Hide/Dash/Disengage as BONUS action)
Ring of Spell Storing (load Invisibility from Raistlin + Bless from Dain each long rest — pre-loaded Misty Step currently inside)
Rapier +2 (1d8+7 — Sneak Attack: 1d8+7+2d6 avg 14.5 — Assassinate crit: 4d8+7+4d6 avg 39)
Venom Fang +2 (bonus action off-hand — 1d4+2+2d10 poison avg 16 — Assassinate crit: 4d4+2+4d10 avg 34)
Shortbow +2 (1d6+7, 80/320ft — ranged Sneak Attack if conditions met)
Expertise: Stealth (+10 total — DEX 5 + prof 2 + cloak 3 = +10 ... wait Expertise doubles prof)
Cloak of Elvenkind (+5 stealth, advantage on stealth while stationary)
Gloves of Stealth (+3 stealth — removes armor noise)
Potion of Invisibility (bonus action, 1 hour invisible or until attack — stacks with Ring use)
Boots of Speed (double movement 30ft→60ft, 1/day 10 min)
Thieves' Tools (pick locks, disarm traps)
Disguise Kit proficiency
Poisoner's Kit proficiency
Caltrops (bag of 20 — slow pursuers, zone control)
Crowbar (+2 STR checks to pry)
Bell + string 10ft (alarm tripwire)
Rope 50ft
Hooded lantern + 2 flasks oil
Darkvision 60ft
Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm, immune to magic sleep)

ring_of_spell_storing.current_load: Misty Step (2nd, pre-loaded by Drow mage) — 2/5 levels used
ring_of_spell_storing.recommended_daily_load: Invisibility (2nd, from Raistlin) + Bless (1st, from Dain or Sweeney) = 3/5 levels used
ring_of_spell_storing.combat_usage: Activate Invisibility before combat → invisible approach → Assassinate auto-crit. Activate Bless at start for +1d4 all attacks. Use Misty Step as emergency escape.

ala-half-elf-rogue.stealth_total: +10 modifier (DEX +5, Expertise doubles prof to +4, Cloak +1... recalc needed)

sweeney-human-cleric.summary: Primary healer/support/aura buffer (Life Domain) — WIS 21, AC 20, stealth +11
capabilities: Cloak of the Arcane Sentinel (+2 AC, +2 all saves, AURA: allies within 10ft get +1 AC + advantage on death saves)
Spiritual Weapon (bonus action 1d8+5 force attack each turn, NO concentration, domain spell)
Healing Word (1d4+8 BONUS ACTION heal 60ft — in-combat heal without losing main action)
Prayer of Healing (10 min, up to 6 creatures each 2d6+9 avg 16 — full party recovery post-fight)
Cure Wounds (1d8+8 touch — domain, always prepared)
Channel Divinity: Preserve Life (distribute 20 HP within 30ft, no slot, 1/short rest)
Aid (pre-combat +5 max HP for 3 creatures, 8 hours)
Lesser Restoration (cure blinded/deafened/paralyzed/poisoned — domain)
Guiding Bolt (+7 hit, 4d6 radiant + advantage to next attacker — best Round 1 setup)
Silence (30ft sphere, no spells/verbal components inside — shuts down enemy casters)
Bless (concentration — +1d4 attacks and saves for 3 creatures)
Sanctuary (target can't be attacked, WIS save DC 15)
Protection from Evil and Good (disadvantage for aberrations/undead/fiends attacking target)
Light Crossbow +2 (+7 to hit, 1d8+5, 80/320ft — main combat action when not healing)
Guidance (+1d4 to any ability check, cantrip)
Sacred Flame (DEX save DC 15 or 1d8 radiant — ignores cover)
Spare the Dying (stabilize 0 HP instantly, cantrip)
Channel Divinity: Turn Undead (undead WIS save DC 15 or flee, 1/short rest)
Disciple of Life (+2+spell level HP bonus on all healing spells)
Dragonguard Breastplate (advantage on saves vs dragon breath weapons)
Cloak of the Warden's Veil (+5 stealth, advantage while stationary)
Gloves of Stealth (+3 stealth)
Stealth total: +11 (DEX +3, Gloves +3, Cloak +5) — advantage while stationary
sweeney-human-cleric.ac_notes: Breastplate 16 + Shield 2 + Cloak 2 = 20. Without shield (crossbow mode): 18. Allies within 10ft get +1 AC from Cloak aura.

capabilities: Animate Dead (raise corpses as zombies — main tactical value)
Hold Person (paralyze humanoid, concentration, WIS save)
Magic Missile (auto-hit 3d4+3 — guaranteed damage)
Misty Step (bonus action teleport 30ft)
Shield (reaction +5 AC)
Commands zombie army (up to 7 raised so far)
hamun-kost-npc-ally.contract: Active through Wave Echo Cave. Gets spellbook back + Forge of Spells access after.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Planar Convergence
scrolls.effect: Teleport entire party up to 50 miles or between planes — EMERGENCY ONLY
